name: PULoader
description: Spinning activity indicator used to signal background work. Light and Dark variants suit any surface. Not a standalone loading screen — compose with a background view.

props.name: variant
props.description: light = purple spinner for white/light surfaces | dark = white spinner for navy/dark surfaces

usage: Full-screen loading: center in a ZStack/Box over the page background
Inline loading: PUButton has a built-in loading prop — prefer that over composing PULoader manually

accessibility.notes: announce 'Loading' via accessibilityLabel when displayed as a full-screen state
